name: Apprentice Mage Robe
description: A magically gifted person can try their luck as an apprentice to an experienced sorcerer. They rarely turn anyone down - not for the love of teaching, but largely because there's always a use for a personal servant.
descriptionZh: 有魔法天赋的人可以找年老的法师拜师学艺，这些法师一般都愿意收个徒弟，倒不是因为热衷教学，主要是需要一个佣人。
